2605.07076.title: Self-Consolidating Language Models: Continual Knowledge Incorporation from Context
2605.07076.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) increasingly receive information as streams of passages, conversations, and long-context workflows. While longer context windows expose more evidence, they do not ensure that useful information is preserved and reused. We study continual context consolidation: writing current context into model weights while limiting interference with previously consolidated information. We propose \textbf{S}elf-\textbf{Co}nsolidating \textbf{L}anguage Models (SCoL), a post-training framework in which, given current context, an LLM learns to generate textual update instructions specifying which of its own Transformer layers should be updated. Because committed updates change the model that later generates future selections, we train SCoL with meta-reinforcement learning over an evolving model state. We instantiate SCoL with supervised QA rewards on SQuAD knowledge incorporation and intrinsic likelihood-based rewards for LongBench v2 long-context consolidation. Across both settings, SCoL improves acquisition and retention over prompting, summarization, batch test-time training, and sequential finetuning baselines. Analysis of learned selection patterns shows that SCoL encourages the LLM to generate sparse update locations that align with layers of high Fisher information, suggesting that the model learns to route plasticity toward loss-sensitive regions while limiting interference. Moreover, SCoL transfers from shorter meta-training streams to longer LongBench v2 streams at evaluation, suggesting that our framework supports scalable streaming consolidation.
2605.07076.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）越來越多地接收作為段落、對話和長上下文工作流程的資訊。雖然較長的上下文窗口能揭示更多的證據，但並不保證有用的資訊會被保留和重用。我們研究持續的上下文整合：在限制對先前整合資訊的干擾的同時，將當前上下文寫入模型權重。我們提出\textbf{S}elf-\textbf{Co}nsolidating \textbf{L}anguage Models（SCoL），這是一個後訓練框架，在這個框架中，給定當前上下文，LLM學會生成文本更新指令，指定應該更新其自身的哪些Transformer層。由於已承諾的更新會改變模型，進而影響未來的選擇，因此我們使用元強化學習對不斷演變的模型狀態進行訓練SCoL。我們在SQuAD知識整合上用監督式QA獎勵和在LongBench v2長上下文整合上用內在基於可能性的獎勵來實現SCoL。在這兩個設置中，SCoL在獲取和保留方面優於提示、摘要、批次測試時訓練和序列微調基準。對學習到的選擇模式的分析顯示，SCoL鼓勵LLM生成與高Fisher信息層對齊的稀疏更新位置，這表明模型學會將可塑性引導到對損失敏感的區域，同時限制干擾。此外，SCoL從較短的元訓練流轉移到較長的LongBench v2流進行評估，這表明我們的框架支持可擴展的流式整合。
2605.07076.author: Zekun Wang et.al.
2605.07076.authors: Zekun Wang, Anant Gupta, Zihan Dong, Christopher J. MacLellan
